description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish and white graphic markings along the receiver and stock, including numbers and stylized 'X' symbols. The rifle features a fixed stock with a textured buttplate, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, supporting flip-up iron sights at the front and rear. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a standard flash hider. The overall design is angular and robust, with visible screws and mechanical details, suggesting a contemporary, semi-automatic or automatic firearm suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with white markings, a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile, flash hider, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, white graphics, magazine, pistol grip, and stock details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's buttplate, pistol grip, and the symmetry of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger area, and additional white markings on the stock and receiver.
